_doc: AUTHORITATIVE RELEASE-STATE CONTRACT (final integration 2026-07-21, integration/v2.11-final-rc). Binds the config identity together with the release identities, the owner-approved switch posture, the PVC provenance and the must-be-unset override hooks. Loaded + fail-closed in a canonical build (release_contract.verify). PROVISIONAL final-RC; no tag/deploy/canonical-score authorised.

present_lens_baseline.note: durable present-lens release-lineage identity; NOT the final complete-board file hash

f5_entrant_reconciliation.canonical_build: rl_export.py RL_LEGF=1 (Option A: engine emits the ladder)

season_metadata.season_prog_source: engine/rl_after/rl_model.py:778 (frozen literal SEASON_PROG=0.58); stamped via rl_model md5 + board md5
season_metadata.as_of_round_source: DYNAMIC weekly stamp (expected_boot + this contract + board-view stamp); advanced by the Track B updater; feeds NO valuation math
season_metadata.rl_season_rounds_role: RL_SEASON_ROUNDS / DEFAULT_SEASON_ROUNDS=24 = ingestion round-bound SANITY guard ONLY (round_apply.py:52,290-295); NOT a valuation input; class B (infra); lives in the gated-OFF store-write path
season_metadata.coherence: season_prog 0.58 agrees with as_of_round/season_total = 14/24 = 0.583 by convention at the release
season_metadata.decoupling_finding: as_of_round (dynamic, weekly) and SEASON_PROG (frozen 0.58 — the ACTUAL valuation fraction) are DECOUPLED; a weekly round advances as_of_round but the updater never re-bakes SEASON_PROG. Re-deriving the fraction from as_of_round/season_total would MOVE approved vectors (a valuation change) — DEFERRED, owner-authorized, NOT this task.
season_metadata.class: A-adjacent: SEASON_PROG is a live valuation semantic bound via rl_model+board md5; as_of_round is dynamic release-lineage state (stamped, weekly); RL_SEASON_ROUNDS is class-B infra
